title: maschalocorymbus corymbosus
intro: Maschalocorymbus corymbosus, also known as the umbrella palm or umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Maschalocorymbus corymbosus include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used to make a poultice or ointment for topical application.
